languages.title: We speak Polish, German, English and Ukrainian
languages.description: We run events across Poland — most often in the west of the country and in eastern Germany. Our team communicates fluently in four languages — guests feel cared for regardless of background.

hero.subtitle: Trusted event company from Zielona Góra. Animations, balloon decorations and 360° photo booths — we deliver events across Poland, from intimate birthdays to large corporate events.

home.servicesTitle: What can we prepare for you?
home.servicesSubtitle: Animations, decorations and photo booths — all backed by over twenty years of experience in the event industry.
home.aboutTitle: A trusted partner in event organisation
home.aboutP1: Event Time is a company from Zielona Góra with over {years} years of history in the event market. Our team of animators and decorators has been delivering entertainment and decorations for private and corporate events — with the same commitment, regardless of scale.
home.aboutP2: We know this market inside out — we know what works at a child's birthday, communion, wedding or team-building event. We treat every booking seriously, because our reputation has been built event by event over the years.
home.aboutP3: We accept bookings from across Poland — we are based in Zielona Góra and most often work in the west of the country and eastern Germany. Longer travel is quoted individually. Contact us — we will prepare an offer tailored to your event.
home.gallerySubtitle: Photos from our events — the portfolio will grow as more materials arrive.

whyUs.label: Why Event Time
whyUs.title: Experience you can rely on
whyUs.subtitle: We are not a newcomer — for years we have been building a reputation as a solid partner in event organisation.

items.title: Over 20 years of experience
items.description: For two decades we have been creating events across Poland — from our base in Zielona Góra. Behind us is a team of trusted animators and decorators.

items.title: Proven company
items.description: Hundreds of families and businesses trust us. We know what works at a party — and we nail every detail before guests arrive.

items.title: Full service
items.description: Animations, balloon decorations and 360° photo booth from one place. No subcontractors, no surprises.

items.title: Personal approach
items.description: Every event is different. We listen, advise and tailor the programme to guests' age, budget and the nature of the celebration.

cta.title: Got an idea for a party?
cta.subtitle: Write to us — we will prepare a quote tailored to your event.

animacje.heroSubtitle: Professional animations for children and adults — from birthdays to corporate events, across Poland.
animacje.intro: Event Time means over 20 years of animation experience and a team that knows how to run a party. We host events in Polish, German, English and Ukrainian. From a colourful clown and giant bubbles to high-energy contests — we tailor the programme to guests' age and the nature of the celebration.
animacje.partySubtitle: We run animations for different occasions — we match the programme to your event.
animacje.attractionsSubtitle: Pick attractions or tell us what you need — we will compose the perfect programme.
animacje.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your celebration — we will prepare a programme and quote.

dekoracje.heroSubtitle: From birthday arches to elegant wedding compositions — we will bring your vision to life.
dekoracje.intro: We create balloon decorations for every occasion — from birthday arches to elegant wedding arrangements. We also offer sequin walls, floral and greenery walls, LED numbers and signs, and complete setups for corporate events.
dekoracje.categoriesTitle: What we can prepare for you
dekoracje.categoriesSubtitle: Balloon arches, decorative walls, LED signage and arrangements tailored to your event.
dekoracje.ctaSubtitle: Describe your vision — we will prepare a design and quote.

luki.title: Balloon arches and garlands
luki.description: Organic arches, entrance gates and garlands — from classic to modern.
luki.detail: We design and install organic arches, entrance gates and balloon garlands — scaled for halls, gardens or venue entrances.

urodziny.title: Birthdays and children's parties
urodziny.description: Themed walls, balloon numbers and décor in the birthday child's colours.
urodziny.detail: Birthday décor for children and adults — themed walls, balloon numbers and arrangements at the entrance and on tables.

sluby.title: Weddings
sluby.description: Elegant décor for the venue, entrances and tables — balloons with flowers and details.
sluby.detail: Elegant wedding décor — entrance arches, arrangements behind the couple, tables and balloon details combined with flowers.

cekinowe.title: Sequin walls
cekinowe.description: Shimmering photo walls in various colours — perfect for parties and events.
cekinowe.detail: Shimmering sequin walls in gold, silver, black and more — ideal photo backdrops, combinable with LED signage and branding.

liczbyLed.title: LED numbers and signs
liczbyLed.description: Illuminated digits, lettering and neon elements — for hire or as part of the décor.
liczbyLed.detail: Illuminated numbers and LED lettering — for hire or as part of a larger setup. Popular for birthdays, anniversaries and corporate events.

kwiatowe.title: Floral and greenery walls
kwiatowe.description: Compositions of flowers and greenery — a natural backdrop for photos and venues.
kwiatowe.detail: Floral and greenery walls as a natural photo backdrop — often combined with balloons for a cohesive venue look.

firmowe.title: Corporate events
firmowe.description: Branding, logo balloons, walls and décor for galas, conferences and team building.
firmowe.detail: Décor for galas, conferences and team building — logo walls, brand colours, LED signage and complete event zones.

inne.title: Communions and other occasions
inne.description: Communions, baby showers, anniversaries — we match the style to your event.
inne.detail: Communions, baby showers, anniversaries and more — we match the style and scale of décor to the venue and occasion.

fotobudka.heroSubtitle: A modern attraction that gets reactions and creates unforgettable memories.
fotobudka.intro: The 360° photo booth is a separate, modern Event Time service — alongside animations and decorations, with the same experience and professionalism you know from us. Guests step onto a rotating platform while the camera captures striking shots from every angle. An attraction that draws crowds and creates great social media content.

steps.title: We set up
steps.description: We bring the 360° booth and prepare the station at your event.

steps.title: We record
steps.description: Guests step on the platform — the camera captures dynamic shots from every side.

steps.title: We share
steps.description: Finished videos go to participants — a perfect keepsake from the event.

fotobudka.ctaTitle: Want a photo booth at your event?
fotobudka.ctaSubtitle: Write to us — we will confirm availability and pricing.

oNas.heroSubtitle: Over 20 years of experience, a trusted team and thousands of events delivered.
oNas.historyP1: Event Time is a trusted event company from Zielona Góra, on the market for over 20 years. Over that time we have built a team that combines a passion for animations with a professional approach to every booking.
oNas.historyP2: We work with experienced animators and decorators — people who connect with children, know how to energise a party and take care of every detail, from the first call to the last balloon in the room.
oNas.historyP3: We specialise in animations, balloon decorations and 360° photo booths. We cover birthdays, communions, weddings, corporate events and outdoor celebrations across Poland — most often in the west of the country and eastern Germany.
oNas.historyP4: We host events in Polish, German, English and Ukrainian. Get in touch — we are happy to tell you more and prepare a quote.

location: Poland and Germany · base: Zielona Góra

serviceArea.title: Poland and Germany — based in Zielona Góra
serviceArea.description: We are based in Zielona Góra but accept bookings from across Poland and Germany. We most often deliver events in western Poland and eastern Germany — where we have the most experience and the shortest travel times.
serviceArea.travelNote: We are happy to travel to more distant regions too. Travel costs are agreed when preparing your quote — clearly, with no hidden fees.
serviceArea.nationwide: Bookings from across Poland and Germany
serviceArea.mapLabel: Event Time service area: base in Zielona Góra, main zone in western Poland and eastern Germany, bookings accepted from across Poland and Germany
